comment: Battle formation offsets — world-space units relative to the battle center.
comment2: Battle center (0,0) = world origin = screen center at default camera.
comment3: offset_x: positive = right;  offset_y: positive = down.
comment4: Y values place the FEET of each character (bottom-center pivot on the ground).
comment5: Staggered diagonal layout matches the original screen-pixel design:
